questions.description: Blocking clarification questions the operator must answer before the plan can be created. Empty when the prompt is already unambiguous.

id.description: Stable identifier, Q1, Q2, … in ask order.

question.description: English, in plain language. A single product-level decision, elaborated enough that the operator understands the trade-off without reading the codebase.

why.description: English. How a different answer changes the plan — the concrete fork it resolves.

options.description: English. Concrete answer options the operator can pick by number; the operator may also reply with free text.
